title: Sparkle Gym — Strength & Balance Training
description: PCF Sparkle Care's signature gym programme using resistance bands and light weights to build strength and improve balance. Guided by trained fitness instructors in small groups for personalised attention.

title: Intergenerational Storytelling with Sparkletots
description: Seniors share stories and read aloud with children from the co-located PCF Sparkletots preschool. A unique intergenerational programme that builds bonds between young and old while keeping seniors mentally engaged.

title: Cognitive Stimulation — Mind Sharpening Games
description: Weekly brain-training session using puzzles, memory games, and cognitive exercises designed to keep seniors mentally sharp. Tailored activities focusing on reducing cognitive decline risk.

title: Sparkle Bakes — Baking Workshop
description: PCF's Sparkle Bakes programme where seniors learn to bake simple recipes including cookies, cakes, and traditional kueh. Products are sold at the Sparkle Shop, giving seniors a sense of purpose and accomplishment.

title: Befriending Service — Buddy Visit
description: Regular weekly visits by trained befriending volunteers who provide companionship and emotional support to socially isolated seniors in the Braddell Heights neighbourhood.

title: Hari Raya Aidilfitri Celebration
description: Festive Hari Raya celebration with traditional Malay snacks, ketupat-making activity, and cultural performances. Open to all seniors and their families.

title: Sparkle Gym — Strength & Balance Training
description: PCF Sparkle Care's signature gym programme using resistance bands and light weights to build strength and improve balance. Guided by trained fitness instructors.

title: Intergenerational Craft Session with Sparkletots
description: Seniors and preschool children from the co-located PCF Sparkletots create craft projects together. Past activities include paper lanterns, greeting cards, and festive decorations.

title: Cognitive Stimulation — Memory Games
description: Mind-stimulating programme with memory games, word puzzles, and number challenges. Tailored to individual cognitive needs to keep seniors' minds sharp and active.

title: Sparkle Shop — Senior Microjobs Programme
description: Seniors participate in simple retail tasks at the Sparkle Shop, earning a small allowance. Part of PCF's Microjobs for Seniors initiative promoting purposeful ageing and financial independence.

title: Karaoke & Sing-Along Session
description: Fun sing-along and karaoke session where seniors enjoy their favourite oldies in Mandarin, Malay, and English. Great for socialising and keeping spirits high.

description: PCF Sparkle Care's signature gym programme with resistance training and balance exercises. Guided by trained instructors at the newly opened Shunfu integrated facility.

title: Console Gaming Rehabilitation
description: Innovative rehabilitation programme using Wii-style console gaming to improve physical coordination and cognitive function. Seniors play motion-controlled games that build upper body strength and reaction time.

description: Guided multi-sensory stimulation session in PCF Sparkle Care's dedicated sensory room. Uses light, sound, and texture to engage seniors with cognitive needs and promote relaxation.

description: Low-impact boxing fitness programme adapted for seniors. Improves hand-eye coordination, upper body strength, and cardiovascular health through fun punching combinations.

description: Seniors read picture books and share life stories with children from PCF Sparkletots preschool located in the same Shunfu integrated facility. Promotes intergenerational bonding.

description: TOUCH's signature HAPPY (Healthy Ageing Promotion Programme for You) combines exercise, cognitive tasks, and healthy ageing advice. Led by trained senior volunteers to improve mental well-being, memory, and functional ability.

description: Group aqua aerobics session at a nearby ActiveSG swimming pool. Low-impact water exercises that are gentle on joints while building strength and cardiovascular fitness. Transport provided from AAC.
